name: Grilled Onions in Puff Pastry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Thinly sliced new potatoes, blanched
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
Preheat the grill. Season each green onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Place the seasoned onions on the grill and cook for 1 minute on each side.
Remove from the grill. Drizzle each pastry shell with olive oil. Season each shell with salt and pepper.
Starting in the center of each pastry shell, layer the potatoes (forming a swirl) and season them with salt and pepper.
Lay a piece of cheese on top of each potato layer.
Lay two grilled green onions on each tart.
Sprinkle each tart with bacon pieces.
Place the tarts on a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the cheese melts and the tarts are golden brown.
Place one tart on a plate and garnish with parsley.
Yield: 4 tarts
